summary:
Claim: Polishing of composite restorations is difficult due to conflicting material behaviors during abrasive processes.  
Evidence: - Soft organic matrix wears down easily under polishing pressure. - Hard filler particles generate micro-abrasions causing surface defects like glossiness or roughness.
